settings.title: Building a National Community of Care

settings.text: With our retail stores in locations across the country, including Athlone, Galway, Ballyhaunis, Cork, Limerick, Tralee, and Dublin we are building a national community servicing the needs of carers, the cared-for and self-carers.
Our expert in-store staff are ready to help you find the best product or service for you, whether you’re modifying your home or simply making everyday changes.
Community, in all its forms, is part of our ethos. We are aiming to create a sustainable Homecare Medical community.
We are committed to working with local Irish communities and charities to provide support to people who need care, in a sustainable and equitable way.

We’ve been providing products and services to the care industry for over 35 years. We don’t believe in standing still, and so we continue to innovate with our services, and deliver a broad range of quality medical devices and consumable products to busy care providers across Ireland.

settings.title: Decontamination
settings.caption: We are fully certified to the highest international standards

settings.text: Homecare Medical has been providing products and services to the care industry for over 35 years. We don’t believe in standing still, and so we continue to innovate with our services, and deliver a broad range of quality medical devices and consumable products to busy care providers across Ireland.

We are a people-focused business. We believe in providing long-term value and support for our carers. We help our carers manage their business so they can focus their energies on what is important to them, helping those in their care.

Our products and services are best-in-class, fine-tuned over the years to enhance caregiving in every setting.

In our busy distribution, logistics and service centre we consult, service, decontaminate, innovate and deliver quality products and services to our clients nationwide.

Our nationwide approach means that no matter where your business is located, you can trust Homecare Medical to deliver.

Our products and services are in every care setting across the island of Ireland, from private homes, residential care, and hospitals to primary care centres and schools. 

In these settings, our products and services are making a real difference. They’re freeing up carers to focus on the important work of helping those in care.
